% sos2cayley astar_bomega.sos --rename a=a,!a=b --keep-identity
% Generated by sosl.sos.viz. Every visual choice is in the \tikzset below:
% edit a style to restyle, edit a coordinate to move a node.
\documentclass[tikz,border=4pt]{standalone}
\usepackage{amssymb}
\usetikzlibrary{arrows.meta,shapes.misc}
\begin{document}
\begin{tikzpicture}[
  class/.style     = {draw, thin, rounded corners=2pt, inner sep=3pt,
                      minimum width=10mm, minimum height=7mm},
  root/.style      = {},          % the root needs no ink: the init stub says it
  init/.style      = {semithick, -{Stealth[length=4pt,width=3pt]}},
  arrow/.style     = {thin, -{Stealth[length=4pt,width=3pt]}},
  lbl/.style       = {font=\small, inner sep=1.5pt, fill=white},
  pairs/.style     = {anchor=north, font=\small},
]

  \node[class,root] (eps) at (8.1,8.7) {$[\varepsilon]$};
  \node[class] (a) at (4.1,4.7) {$[a]$};
  \node[class] (b) at (12.7,4.7) {$[b]$};
  \node[class] (ab) at (1.0,0.6) {$[a{\cdot}b]$};
  \node[class] (ba) at (9.5,0.6) {$[b{\cdot}a]$};

  % the root is the adjoined identity: a source, marked like an initial state
  \draw[init] (8.1,9.6) -- (eps);

  \draw[arrow] (eps) to[loop above] node[lbl] {$[\varepsilon]$} (eps);
  \draw[arrow] (eps) to node[lbl] {$[a]$} (a);
  \draw[arrow] (eps) to node[lbl] {$[b]$} (b);
  \draw[arrow] (eps) to node[lbl] {$[a{\cdot}b]$} (ab);
  \draw[arrow] (eps) to node[lbl] {$[b{\cdot}a]$} (ba);
  \draw[arrow] (a) to[loop above] node[lbl] {$[\varepsilon],[a]$} (a);
  \draw[arrow] (a) to node[lbl] {$[b],[a{\cdot}b]$} (ab);
  \draw[arrow] (a) to node[lbl] {$[b{\cdot}a]$} (ba);
  \draw[arrow] (b) to[loop above] node[lbl] {$[\varepsilon],[b]$} (b);
  \draw[arrow] (b) to node[lbl] {$[a],[a{\cdot}b],[b{\cdot}a]$} (ba);
  \draw[arrow] (ab) to[loop above] node[lbl] {$[\varepsilon],[b]$} (ab);
  \draw[arrow] (ab) to node[lbl] {$[a],[a{\cdot}b],[b{\cdot}a]$} (ba);
  \draw[arrow] (ba) to[loop above] node[lbl] {$[\varepsilon],[a],[b],[a{\cdot}b],[b{\cdot}a]$} (ba);

  \node[pairs] at (6.8,-0.7) {$\lambda:\; a \rightarrowtail [a],\;\; b \rightarrowtail [b]$};
  \node[pairs] at (6.8,-1.5) {$P = \{\, ([b],[b]),\; ([a{\cdot}b],[b]) \,\}$};
\end{tikzpicture}
